title: miconia axillaris
intro: Miconia axillaris, also known as the 'Rengarenga' or 'Wharawhara', is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Miconia axillaris are believed to be due to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Miconia axillaris can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea, or by using a tincture made from the plant's leaves and stems.
